reference: Years ago, I experienced a popping sensation in my head. Before it happened, I had a dull headache. I bent over, and I heard and felt a popping sensation in the back of my head. I was unable to stand upright without a rushing feeling in my head. I was hospitalized, and for several nights, I would experience a strange rushing sensation when I sat upright. I know this sounds strange, but it has always concerned me. I don’t really speak about it because of how crazy it sounds. I was never diagnosed; I basically diagnosed myself with a transient ischemic attack.
text: Years ago, I experienced a popping sensation in my head. Before it happened, I had a dull headache. I bent over and I felt the popping sensation in the back of my head. I was unable to stand upright without a rushing feeling in my head. I was hospitalized and for several nights, I would experience a strange rushing sensation when I sat upright. I know this sounds strange, but it has always concerned me. I don't really speak about it because of how crazy it sounds. I was never diagnosed. I basically diagnosed myself with a transient ischemic attack.
